# BEST-Route (Microsoft Research)

- **Repository:** https://github.com/microsoft/best-route-llm
- **License (GitHub API, verification time):** **MIT** (repository metadata); raw `LICENSE` on default branch was not retrieved via `main` path at verification time — **re-verify** in your clone.
- **Import status:** **Linked only** — no submodule, no vendored code in this repo.
- **Role for this project:** Baseline for **routing** among LLMs / strategies; relevant to frontier allocation and cost-aware model selection.

## Setup notes (upstream)

```bash
git clone https://github.com/microsoft/best-route-llm.git
```

## Integration scaffold (this repo)

- Registry entry: `configs/external_baselines_registry.json` → `best_route_microsoft`
- This directory contains **documentation only**.
